paper_title: MERA: Model Evolution and Routing with Skill Adaptation for Agentic Systems at Scale
status: provisional — A800 offline day 36; GRPO results n=1 seed; 4-cycle HumanEval DAPO results added (skills 70.7%→75.6%, Full=Router, 52.4% zero-variance); tau2 held-out router overfitting remains unresolved

strongest_claims.he_4cycle_skills_arm: Skills arm improves 70.73%->75.61% over 4 DAPO cycles on HumanEval
strongest_claims.he_4cycle_routing: Full system 92.68% routing accuracy at 27.56% cost (cycle 3)
strongest_claims.tau2_joint_peak: 89.19% task pass at 22.16% of always-large cost (Cycle 1, joint run)
strongest_claims.tau2_small_dominates: 35B MoE 80% > GPT-5.4 71% on held-out tau2 tasks

new_findings_2026_06_19.he_4cycle_dapo: 4-cycle HumanEval MERA (DAPO G=8): skills arm 70.73%->75.61%, Full=Router at cycle 3
new_findings_2026_06_19.zero_variance_dapo_g8: 52.4% (43/82) zero-variance groups at G=8 DAPO on HumanEval — bottleneck quantified
new_findings_2026_06_19.dapo_vs_standard: DAPO G=8 reduces zero-variance from 73% (G=4 standard) to 52.4% — significant but incomplete
new_findings_2026_06_19.full_equals_router: Full variant = Router variant at cycle 3 (92.68%) — GRPO cannot surpass router with 52.4% zero-variance

critical_blockers: EXP-038: multi-seed GRPO (n=3) to verify +2pp claim — blocked on A800
EXP-066: tau2 router regularization to fix held-out overfitting — blocked on A800
EXP-076: forgetting_eval cycle-3 grpo_adapter on MBPP — blocked on A800
EXP-077: DAPO G=16 DDT to reduce 52.4% zero-variance — blocked on A800
EXP-080: multi-seed 4-cycle HumanEval validation — blocked on A800 (new this run)
EXP-081: zero-variance scaling curve G=4/8/16/32 — blocked on A800 (new this run)
